subject: Re:
body:
No doubt he and DT know each other well too. Have to say, he is looking/sounding increasingly unhinged -- are you tempted to take any money off the table in the markets?

---
Landon Thomas, Jr.  
Financial Reporter  
New York Times  
<http://topics.nytimes.com/top/reference/timestopics/people/t/landon_jr_thomas/index.html>
